query: SELECT id, homeTeamId, awayTeamId, gameDate, gameTime, venueId, isEvaluationGame FROM games WHERE gameDate IN ('2026-06-23', '2026-06-25') AND homeTeamId IN (180001, 180002) ORDER BY gameDate
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Tr7sytVxCuD6SR.root --database Fde3d448vCxuYB8KePk65W --execute SELECT id, homeTeamId, awayTeamId, gameDate, gameTime, venueId, isEvaluationGame FROM games WHERE gameDate IN ('2026-06-23', '2026-06-25') AND homeTeamId IN (180001, 180002) ORDER BY gameDate
